1.profile_notes: Needs space + babysit early; Battle Fury timing decides game. Counters high-mana lineups (Medusa, Storm, Leshrac) via Mana Break/Void. Mana Void only 0.3s ministun (interrupt-only, not counted as stun/control). Counterspell is self-only — no save credit. Weak vs early lockdown chains and deathball before 25min; thrives on split-push maps.

10.profile_notes: Attribute Shift makes him near-unkillable without burst-through-str or silence/hex mid-shift; Eblade+Adaptive Strike deletes squishies. Str-Adaptive stuns (0.5-2.4s) + knocks back up to 350 (scales with str:agi, max when str > 1.5x agi). Weak early lane; countered by AM, Nyx, silences. 7.41c: Waveform casts toward target direction beyond cast range.

100.profile_notes: Pickoff roamer: Snowball (unit-target, reliable; stun 0.6-1.2s +0.2s/ally) carries allies in AND scoops them to safety - save #1. Shard Drinking Buddies pulls an ally to Tusk with MS/armor - save #2 (7.41c: cannot cast while rooted). Ice Shards wall (4-7s) physically blocks even BKB'd enemies (terrain, not a debuff). Scepter Walrus Kick = enemy relocation. Walrus Punch crit deletes squishies early; falls off late; weak vs ranged kite lanes.

101.profile_notes: Top magic burst support: Ancient Seal amp (6s silence) + Mystic Flare deletes a squishy; 7.41c buff: Flare CD down to 55/35/15. Needs setup lockdown (Atos/ally stun) since Flare requires target standing still. Fully negated by BKB/Pipe/dispels - zero BKB-piercing tools; paper-thin, no escape.

102.profile_notes: Top-tier saver: Aphotic Shield strong-dispels stuns/silences (save_count=2 with Mist Coil heal). Borrowed Time auto-trigger makes him near-unkillable (self-survival, counted in resilience, NOT as BKB-pierce — he has no enemy-targeting ability that pierces debuff immunity; Curse silence is blocked by BKB, hence bkb_pierce corrected 1->0). Silence only after 4 Curse stacks (conditional). No lockdown — needs CC partners.

103.profile_notes: Astral Spirit Echo Stomp sleeps THROUGH BKB (spirit portion is physical) — but Echo Stomp is a ~1.3s CHANNEL, interruptible and the sleep breaks on damage, so lockdown_reliability corrected aoe->channel (initiation_reliability stays aoe for the combo). Natural Order auras shred armor/MR and pierce debuff immunity. Earth Splitter %maxHP ult on ~100s cooldown (big_ult_100s flag corrected 0->1) is elite HG defence.

104.profile_notes: Blink+Duel = 4-5.5s mutual taunt lockdown that PIERCES BKB (taunt pierces debuff immunity); permanent damage stacks on duel wins (snowball or feed). Press the Attack is a basic-dispel ally save (save_count=1, weaker than Grave-tier — save_score 38). Single-target ult so teamfight_ult_count=0. Punishes solo-mobile heroes; countered by saves (Grave, False Promise) that deny duel kills.

105.profile_notes: Reworked kit: NO stun (has_stun=0 confirmed). Sticky Bomb spam dominates lanes; Blast Off = jump escape/engage with AoE silence (self-damage); Reactive Tazer disarm rounds out 3 soft-control tools, none pierce BKB. Proximity Mines = iconic HG/area denial and choke control (defense_score 92 specialist). All-magical damage — hard-countered by BKB/Pipe; no lockdown of his own.

106.profile_notes: Elusive tempo core: Fire Remnant cross-map dashes + Sleight invulnerability make him near-uncatchable without instant lockdown/roots. Battlefury Sleight flash-farms and cleaves fights. Searing Chains is a ROOT, not forced movement (forced_movement=0 correct) and is blocked by BKB; needs melee range, hits random nearby targets (conditional). Magic early, physical late.

107.profile_notes: Skillshot playmaker: roll(stun 0.9s, 1.8s via remnant)+kick repositions enemies into allies (true enemy forced movement); Magnetize pierces BKB, refreshes via remnants; Grip pulls allies to safety; Aghs Enchant Remnant 2.4s save/disable. High skill floor, snowball roamer. Verified: forced_movement=Boulder Smash on enemies, saves=Grip+Aghs banish.

108.profile_notes: 5-man deathball anchor: Pit re-roots up to 4x at chokes (root, NOT forced movement), Firestorm %maxHP burn melts tanks/illusions, Atrophy aura guts physical cores. Fiend's Gate (CD 100) = global flank initiation for the team (soft/conditional) + retreats; elite HG defense and top-tier lane dominance. No saves, no pickoff threat.

109.profile_notes: Fastest-sieging pos1: Metamorphosis+illusions melt towers and HG; Sunder swaps HP (self-reset or clutch ally save, CD 40 lvl3) — HP swap is a save, NOT forced movement/relocation. Fragile pre-meta and vs long lockdown chains/burst; wants space. Aghs Terror Wave adds 2s AoE fear+instant meta (only control tool, aghs-gated).

11.profile_notes: Triple-raze burst + Requiem fear (fear is a debuff, blocked by BKB); Presence -armor aura amplifies all physical cores (aura pierces BKB). Top-tier farmer, greedy mid needing Blink/Euls for Requiem (CD 120/110/100); very fragile, no escape or initiation of his own, weak to gap-closers and early silences. Untouched in 7.41c.

110.profile_notes: Teamfight DoT support: Supernova (CD120) 2.4s AoE stun pierces BKB but egg is killable (6/8/10 hero hits) — conditional lockdown, mirrors Chrono-style conditional reliability; needs setup/bodyguards; aghs reborns an ally too. All spells cost HP; -140 AS slow wrecks melee carries; countered by fast egg-killers (Ursa, MK, TB). Can start fights (Dive+Nova) = soft initiator.

111.profile_notes: Premier saver (3 save tools: False Promise, Fate's Edict, Purifying Flames heal): False Promise (strong dispel, delays all damage, CD 60 lvl3) enables coin-flip dives and nullifies burst; Edict = ally 100% magic immunity or enemy disarm 5s; Q purges buffs+roots up to 2.75s (unit-targeted = reliable; channel only extends duration, min 0.75s instant). Brutal lane harass; weak vs sustained physical.

112.profile_notes: Winter's Curse pierces BKB — premier counter-initiation vs clumped melee carries. Cold Embrace fully negates physical burst (anti-PA/Ursa) — top-tier save. Curse punishes own AoE teams (allies hit cursed unit). Arctic Burn unobstructed pathing for harass/kiting. No proactive initiation (reactive only). 7.41c: only Winter's Curse bug fixes (Blade Mail/Chipped Vest interactions).

113.profile_notes: Tempest Double duplicates items — doubles splitpush/siege and item actives (Hex/Gleipnir scale into pseudo-control); the definitive macro/splitpush specialist. Flux punishes isolated heroes; weak vs gap-closers reaching the real body. Wants drawn-out maps; micro-intensive, draft anti-blink lockdown vs him. Untouched in 7.41c (7.41 rune-infusion innate intact).

114.profile_notes: Tree-dependent: ambushes/escapes via Tree Dance — tree-cutters (Timber, Bat, tangoes) and AoE that knocks him off trees (mini-stun) hard-counter. Wukong's Command needs lockdown setup or he leaves the ring. Jingu makes him a top-3 lane bully. Boundless Strike stun 0.7-1.3s (1.5 with lvl10 talent). 7.41c: Tree Dance flying vision no longer sees into Roshan pits.

119.profile_notes: Terrorize fear pierces BKB — elite anti-dive/peel and teamfight reset (fear is loss-of-control, NOT forced movement: enemies flee on own movespeed). Cursed Crown delayed targeted stun (1.5-2.4s after 4s delay) is dispellable but reliable combo setup; Bramble Maze root up to 2.5s. Shadow Realm burst deletes supports; can pivot to aghs right-click build. Squishy, weak vs gap-close. 7.41c: bug fix only (Bedlam cast range display).

12.profile_notes: Illusion-swarm hard carry; Doppelganger dodges projectiles/ults. Counters single-target lockdown drafts, dies to AoE cleave/Medusa/ES. Diffusal+Manta spike; elite split-push and Roshan/HG siege late. 7.41c trimmed Aghs Phantom Rush max distance bonus 625->575 (minor).

120.profile_notes: Rolling Thunder = magic-immune AoE stun initiation/escape — premier AoE initiator, but countered by roots/leashes (stop the ball: Naga net, Disruptor field, Treant). Shield Crash stacks make him very tanky in fights. Swashbuckle trades strong but 7.41c nerfed Swashbuckle/Roll Up mana costs, lvl10 Lucky Shot armor talent and base HP regen — lane sustain trimmed. Tempo peaks 15-30 min.

121.profile_notes: Soulbind (60s CD lvl3, 8s bind) leashes 2 enemies and doubles single-target spells — elite with Lion/Bane/Doom/hex drafts. Ink Swell = stun (max 2.8s, builds up only while enemies stay near the inked ally) + ally dive/save tool. Strong lane harass via Stroke of Fate. No kill threat alone, needs allied follow-up — not an initiator.

123.profile_notes: Tree-dependent: Bushwhack (1.5-2.1s stun) only stuns near trees — lockdown is conditional, not just a skillshot; strong in jungle/treeline fights, weak in open ground (mid river, ruined HG). Sharpshooter applies break — counters PA/Bristle/Tide passives. Acorn plants its own tree for combos. Bushwhack pulls victims to the tree but is a stun, not relocation control.

126.profile_notes: Tempo mid, snowballs via pickoffs on immobile supports; Aether Remnant drags+holds (true enemy relocation, ~1.4s) for ally AoE. Dissimilate dodges spells (Ravage/RP). Shard adds AoE silence to Resonant Pulse. Falls off vs heavy reliable lockdown and silences.

128.profile_notes: Firesnap Cookie (1-2.2s AoE stun) triples as conditional stun, ally save (hop out of danger) and gap-close — pairs with melee initiators (Mars, Slardar). Mortimer Kisses (120/110/100s CD — 100s-class ult, not 80s) = elite HG defense/siege zoning with burn pools. Top-tier lane harass via Scatterblast point-blank. Nothing in kit pierces debuff immunity.

129.profile_notes: Blink+Arena of Blood (~70s CD lvl3, 5.75s) traps even BKB carries — walls block spell-immune movement, specialist anti-BKB tool. Bulwark hard-counters physical right-click drafts (specialist resilience). Spear skewer + God's Rebuke knockback = 2 enemy-relocation tools; Rebuke also interrupts channels. Spear pin needs terrain/tree behind target (conditional). Weak vs magic burst and high-mobility heroes who jump arena walls.

13.profile_notes: Elusive tempo mid; Dream Coil punishes clumped fights but NO LONGER pierces BKB — 7.41c removed the lvl25 pierce talent (now -30s coil CD; lvl15 -15s CD talent also replaced), so debuff immunity escapes coil at any stage. Phase Shift dodges key ults; bullies slow melee drafts; weak vs instant point-click lockdown (Lion, SS) and Orchid.

131.profile_notes: Wheel of Wonder mesmerize (AoE hypnosis, drags enemies toward wheel = forced movement) — elite in chokes/HG defense; needs AoE follow-up (Magnus/PB) on clumped targets; does NOT pierce BKB. NO stun: control is fear (Tame the Beasts, interrupt-class), Impalement Arts slow, mesmerize. Escape Act = top-tier save (specialist, 85) vs blink-burst and single-target ults, self-castable, lvl25 strong dispel. Verified: no hex, no real stun.

135.profile_notes: Solar Guardian = global save (specialist, 80) / counter-initiation + AoE heal + landing stun 1.4/1.6/1.8s that PIERCES debuff immunity (verified vs wiki — bkb_pierce=1 confirmed, raises anti-BKB value); punishes split fights, great HG defense rotations. Celestial Hammer converge moves only herself (no enemy displacement, forced_movement=0 correct). Starbreaker channel cancellable, cannot cast ult during it. Luminosity sustain wins trades.

136.profile_notes: Dispose throws enemy OR ally (true enemy relocation = forced_movement, plus ally save/reposition); enemy stun 1.1s on landing — conditional lockdown (melee-range point-blank dependency, same calibration class as Chrono=conditional). Rebound = reliable point-target gap-close to any unit (initiation reliability=reliable), ally-bounce gives MS — mobility specialist (82). Sidekick wants a lane/fight buddy (lifesteal+dmg). Unleash flurries countered by break, kiting, ghost/eul; pos-1 viable but falls off vs counters (late 55).

137.profile_notes: Pulverize pierces BKB (verified; single-target channel ~2.3s lockdown, reliability=channel — same class as Shackles) — premier punish vs BKB carries, anti-BKB specialist (85); short 30s CD = fights constantly (fight_cooldown 75). Onslaught long-range engage stun ~1.6s but windup is interruptible (initiation=skillshot). Trample magic DPS scales off attack dmg. No escape, no save: vulnerable to kiting/Eul after jump-in.

138.profile_notes: FIXED: has_escape 1->0 — no movement escape (no blink/dash; Pierce the Veil is physical immunity + magical right-clicks, an offensive transform, not mobility) — dominates physical carries (PA/Ursa/TA) but hard-countered by enemy BKB/Pipe timings. Dead Shot fear 0.8-1.25s interrupts channels but does NOT pierce BKB and is not lockdown (interrupt_only=1, fear excluded from forced_movement per taxonomy). The Calling AoE: revenants silence on contact up to 3s + 20% slow — holds HG. Immobile, needs peel; late-game specialist (82).

14.profile_notes: Hook pickoffs drive tempo; Hook (pure-dmg pull, drags debuff-immune units) and channeled Dismember (stun+dmg) pierce BKB, but Rot slow/damage does NOT — still a strong anti-BKB pick. Hook entry is a skillshot, Dismember itself is a reliable point-click channel. Can hook allies to safety; Flesh Heap snowballs HP. Needs fog/smoke setup; near-zero mobility and push. Untouched in 7.41c.

145.profile_notes: Dual-stance tempo carry: Katana burst (Echo Slash+Raptor Dance, bleed stacks), Sai utility (Shodo Sai parry+0.4s counter-stun, Raven's Veil 2.75s AoE silence+invis escape). Grappling Claw is SELF-mobility (pulls Kez to target, slows enemy 80% until arrival) — no enemy relocation. Shard impale pins target in place (0.5s, no displacement) = pickoff. Parry punishes right-click lanes; weak vs ranged kite/lockdown.

15.profile_notes: Static Link inverts 1v1 lanes — drafted to bully melee mids/carries (link cannot attach to an already-immune target, but once attached the drain persists through BKB). Tanky sustained-DPS bruiser; Aghs Eye of the Storm shreds buildings; kited by long-range slows. 7.41c gave minor talent buffs (lvl15 link steal +5->+6, lvl20 Storm Surge multiplier x1.3->x1.35).

155.profile_notes: Melee bard amplifier: Catchy Lick pulls+basic-dispels (saves allies, drags enemies short distance, 7s CD — real forced movement but blocked by BKB), Frogstomp 0.1s ministuns interrupt channels/TPs, Croak of Genius mana-discount+damage-reverb amps spell cores. Amphibian Rhapsody songs (AoE heal/MS/spell-amp on beat, Encore extends buffs) disarm Largo himself. Teamfight/sustain specialist, no escape, no fight-starting tool. Flex 3/4/5, beat-timing skill.

16.profile_notes: Classic Blink+Epicenter AoE initiator; Sand Storm invis flash-farms jungle (farm/dot specialist, whole kit is pulsing DoT) and anchors HG defence; entire kit blocked by BKB and ruined by detection/silence before Epicenter channel; mid-game timing hero, falls off late.

17.profile_notes: Premier tempo mid and pickoff initiator: Ball Lightning fly-in starts fights map-wide after Orchid/Kaya timing (soft initiation, SB-Charge-like); Electric Vortex is a BKB-blocked pull-disable; mana = HP and mobility — hard countered by silences, leashes (Heaven's Halberd/Orchid) and pre-6 pressure.

18.profile_notes: Snowball cleave carry: Blink+Storm Hammer is a unit-targeted (reliable) AoE-splash stun, Warcry team armor/MS; God's Strength windows decide fights — force fights on ult CD; physical damage still works vs BKB but he is easily kited without BKB/Blink; aghs hammer self-throw adds gap-close.

19.profile_notes: Blink Ava+Toss combo (~2.4s chained lockdown) deletes squishy heroes pre-BKB — among the highest pre-BKB burst combos; Toss forced movement repositions enemies into team (or ally to safety); transitions into tree-cleave right-clicker via Grow armor/damage; very low MS, Blink-dependent.

2.profile_notes: Blink+Call hard initiator (initiation specialist, 85); Call (AoE taunt) and Culling execute both pierce BKB. Lockdown 'conditional' — entirely Blink-timing/positioning dependent, same convention as Chrono. Counter Helix (pure dmg) punishes melee carries and illusion heroes (PL, Naga). Kited hard by ranged lanes and forced-movement.

20.profile_notes: Pos4/5 with BKB-piercing Nether Swap — both initiation (pull BKB'd carry into team) and elite clutch ally save (instant, pierces BKB, but sacrificial positioning); Wave of Terror -armor amplifies physical cores; reliable targeted Magic Missile stun; aghs death-illusion keeps aura/fight presence after dying.

21.profile_notes: Shackleshot needs tree/unit behind target (3.25s latched, 0.6s fail stun - conditional lockdown). Focus Fire deletes towers and its physical attacks keep working through BKB. Windrun evasion dies to MKB/Bloodthorn. Tempo pickoff core; Shard Gale Force adds AoE pull displacement (forced movement).

22.profile_notes: Global Thundergod's Wrath (130s CD flat, 7.36b-7.41) finishes kills and joins every fight with 600-radius True Sight on each enemy hero; Lightning Bolt gives true sight + 0.35s interrupt vs channels/invis. Zero real lockdown - needs CC partners. Hard countered by Pipe/BKB; Heavenly Jump is his only out.

23.profile_notes: X Marks (targeted, 6s on allies) guarantees Torrent+Ghostship combo and doubles as ally save (pull back from danger). Torrent stun 1.4s (nerfed 7.36), Ghostship stun 1.2s (nerfed 7.33). Shard Tidal Wave drags enemies (second forced movement). Tidebringer cleave bullies melee lanes and farms fast. Rum gives allies delayed damage absorption (2x potency when applied via Ghostship, 7.41). Strongest vs low-mobility lineups.

25.profile_notes: Light Strike Array 0.5s delay needs setup CC or Eul/blink (2.4s stun at max); full combo deletes squishies in ~2s. Laguna Blade is MAGICAL and blocked by BKB - pure BKB-piercing Aghs Laguna was removed in 7.33 (Scepter now grants Flame Cloak: flight, spell amp, magic resist). Fiery Soul stacks enable right-click flex builds (physical damage still works vs BKB). Very fragile, no escape, no initiation.

26.profile_notes: Chain CC: Earth Spike (2.2s max) + Hex (3.2s max) = ~5.4s solo targeted lockdown; Hex is true polymorph (targeted, reliable, instakills illusions). Finger stacks snowball burst. Blink Dagger core for pickoff initiation. Mana Drain sustains lane (shard adds debuff immunity while channeling). Falls off vs BKB late; aghs AoE Finger restores teamfight relevance.

27.profile_notes: Best pos5 pusher: Serpent Wards melt T3/rax (ult CD 110/105/100); 7.41 shard Urnaconda adds a Massive Serpent Ward. Hex 2.9s (reliable instant target) + Shackles 4.2s channel = ~7s solo lockdown chain for pickoffs, but Shackles is interruptible. NOT a leash and not a teamfight ult - wards are siege/pickoff tools. No escape, 285 MS, very squishy - prime initiation target. Pairs with siege lineups (Lycan, DP, Jakiro).

28.profile_notes: Blink+Crush AoE initiator, but stuns are SHORT in 7.41: Crush 0.8s (+35%/6s slow), Bash of the Deep 1.0s - needs team follow-up. 7.41c nerf: Crush CD 7 -> 8.5/8/7.5/7. Corrosive Haze pierces BKB and gives true sight - top counter to invis/evasion (Riki, PA, BH, Weaver). Premier -armor amplifier for physical lineups; kited by ranged/mobile teams.

29.profile_notes: Ravage (150/145/140s CD, 2/2.4/2.8s stun) = premier AoE teamfight init; game revolves around Blink/Refresher windows. Ravage does NOT pierce BKB - enemy BKB timing counters him hard. Kraken Shell auto strong-dispels. 7.41 innate Leviathan's Catch: permanent HP/range/block stacks from fish on kills, no cap. Shard Dead in the Water = anchor leash (restrains, does not relocate). Classic high-ground defender.

3.profile_notes: Premier anti-BKB support: Enfeeble and Fiend's Grip pierce spell immunity (Nightmare does NOT — excluded from pierce count). NOT a hex hero — Nightmare/Grip are sleep/channel, no polymorph. 12s+ single-target chain (Nightmare 7s into Grip 5s); Brain Sap pure damage. Nightmare doubles as projectile-dodge/ally save and combo setup (Mirana arrow); soft initiation via point-click pickoffs. Channel ult needs team cover; zero farm needs.

30.profile_notes: Cask chain-stun (1s per bounce on heroes) dominates 2v2 lanes; it is NOT a hex and NOT a leash - WD has no real polymorph. Maledict is the signature burst-amp DoT - pairs with nuke-heavy cores. Death Ward channel (80s CD lvl3) melts clumped fights and its physical attacks hit through BKB, but dies to any interrupt; needs BKB/protection. 7.41c buffed Voodoo Restoration radius to flat 650.

31.profile_notes: Elite lane support: Frost Blast harass + Frost Shield sustain; Shield works on allies AND towers - anti-push/anti-siege specialist pos5 (defensive save, not a Grave). Chain Frost (100/80/60s CD - not a big-CD ult) bursts 2-hero clumps/duo lanes in a ~4s window. Sinister Gaze = forced movement: channeled pull dragging the enemy to Lich, interrupts channels (2.3s, 7.41c: 25% mana burn/s). No stun, no initiation, falls off late.

32.profile_notes: Perma-invis pickoff: Smoke Screen AoE silence+miss stops channels/casters (silence, not lockdown); Tricks of the Trade dodges targeted spells (aghs lets it follow a unit); shard Sleeping Dart is his only true lockdown. Snowballs with Diffusal vs squishy supports; hard-countered by sentries/dust, AoE stuns and tanky cores.

33.profile_notes: Blink+BKB dependent hard initiator; Black Hole is a channel that pierces debuff immunity and pulls to center, game-winning with Refresher or stacked AoE (Magnus/AA/Invoker); Midnight Pulse pure DoT also works through BKB. Eidolons flash-farm/push and enable early Rosh. Useless fight if BH baited or cancelled (Eul/Hex).

34.profile_notes: Rearm spam: effectively zero spell cooldowns (items do not rearm since the 7.33 rework); Defense Matrix is an ally barrier+status-resist save; Laser blind ruins right-clickers but is a debuff, not control. Constant TP map pressure and pickoffs. Punished by long silences, gap-closers and deathball before timings.

35.profile_notes: Extreme attack range, zero escape: needs frontline/space team and dies to gap-closers (Storm, SB, Clinkz, Spectre). Shrapnel DoT sieges and defends HG superbly; Assassinate snipes fleeing targets; shard grenade displaces Sniper himself, not enemies. Drafts that protect him scale to strong late.

36.profile_notes: Attrition tank: Heartstopper degen works through BKB and Reaper's Scythe pierces debuff immunity; Ghost Shroud nullifies right-clicks (counters Huskar/PA/Alch dives) but amplifies magic taken. Scythe executes tanky cores and punishes towerdives. Weak to magic burst, silences and kiting.

37.profile_notes: Refresher double-golem wins fights alone. Chaotic Offering AoE stun can soft-initiate 5v5 fights (Ravage-style, no blink needed). Fatal Bonds amplifies all team damage (synergy with AoE/cleave cores). Upheaval zone up to 100% slow. Damage is mixed: golem physical + Shadow Word DoT + Bonds amplification. Very low tempo between ult CDs (165s) - drafts around 5v5 teamfights, not pickoffs.

38.profile_notes: Primal Roar pierces BKB - best reliable blink-initiation answer to slippery/BKB cores (Storm, AM, Ember). Single-target ult, not a teamfight ult. Hawk = free deep vision. Boars+Inner Beast aura drive strong early tower timings (HoD push). Micro-heavy, falls off 40+ min.

39.profile_notes: Dominates melee mids; Blink pickoffs drive pre-25min tempo. Sonic Wave pure damage pierces BKB; its knockback is real forced movement (relocates/interrupts channels and TPs) but minor - not a Hook/Swap-class reposition tool. Zero lockdown - needs team setup to convert burst. Flash-farms with Scream, strong vs squishy lineups, weak vs tanky.

4.profile_notes: Rupture (pure, undispellable, persists through BKB if pre-cast) punishes mobile heroes (Storm, AM, Ember) and synergizes with allied forced movement (VS Swap, Skewer) — but relocates no one itself, so forced_movement=0. Blood Rite 6s AoE silence is his only hard control; no lockdown, no initiation tool (reliability=none). Thirst gives global haste snowball on kills; weak vs TP-out and stand-and-fight cores.

40.profile_notes: Iconic DoT: Poison Nova + Gale + Sting melt fights over time; punishes drafts lacking dispels/sustain. Plague Wards excel at HG defense and lane harass. No initiation tools at all (slows only) - follows up, never starts. No lockdown, no escape, 280 MS - free pickoff target. No forced movement despite legacy data flag. Flexible 4/5/3.

41.profile_notes: Chronosphere pierces BKB but locks allies too - lockdown is conditional on placement and ranged AoE follow-up (Warlock, Witch Doctor, Lina); a bad Chrono loses the fight. Time Walk undoes recent damage = strong escape/dive. Weak lane, item-dependent; Time Lock bash adds DPS lockdown late.

42.profile_notes: Two lives via Reincarnation forces enemies to kill him twice; counter with mana burn (Nyx/AM/Pugna ward) or Necro shard. Blink+Blast pickoff with reliable 1.6s stun (burn DoT+slow after stun); stun does NOT pierce debuff immunity. Bone Guard skeletons enable radiance farm and sidelane pressure. Very item-dependent.

43.profile_notes: Deathball/push core: Exorcism (physical, hits buildings, works vs BKB) takes towers around ult timings; fights must be taken near her ult windows (~115s CD). Spirit Siphon makes her near-unkillable in extended fights; counters: burst before siphons, kiting, AA. Up to 6s AoE silence with slow.

44.profile_notes: Physical crit burst: deletes squishy targets in 1-2 hits with Coup de Grace; Phantom Strike gap-close, Blur evasion+escape; Stifling Dagger 50% slow for chase/harass. Hard-countered by MKB/Bloodthorn, break (Silver Edge), and heavy disable chains; weak vs tanky lineups and high armor. BKB-reliant in fights.

45.profile_notes: Nether Blast damages towers - elite early push/HG defence. Nether Ward punishes spell-spam lineups (Storm, Zeus, Bristle) and mana-burns WK. Decrepify saves allies vs physical and amplifies magic burst (decrep+blast+dagon combo); Life Drain can heal allies. Weak vs silences and gap-closers; Decrepify blocked by debuff immunity.

46.profile_notes: Tempo mid: Refraction wins instance-damage lanes but is countered by DoT/summons (Venomancer, Brood, Phoenix). Psi Blades stack-farm + early tower burst; Psionic Trap grants map vision/60% slow setup for blink-Meld pickoffs. Needs blink; falls off vs hard late carries.

47.profile_notes: Iconic lane bully; Viper Strike slow pierces BKB (his one anti-BKB tool); Nethertoxin breaks passives; stacking DoTs melt tanks but zero hard CC and no save/initiation. Very low mobility, kited by force staff/gap-closers; mid-game timing hero, fades vs true hard carries. 7.41c: only change is Aghs Nosedive CD 20->25.

48.profile_notes: Moon Glaives bounces = elite farm speed, push and HG defense; Eclipse deletes clumped fights/solo targets (beams do NOT stun). Lucent Beam is only a 0.6s ministun (1.1s w/ lvl10 talent) - interrupt, not lockdown. Lunar Orbit gives 8-20% damage reduction; Lunar Blessing team damage aura (global at night). Weak laner pre-glaives, fragile, no escape; spikes at Manta/Lance timing.

49.profile_notes: Blink+Dragon Tail 1.8-2.4s = premier single-target pickoff initiation (conditional: needs Blink; 500-range targeted projectile in Elder Dragon Form vs 150 melee in human form). Elder Dragon Form (corrosive lvl1/splash lvl2/frost lvl3, Aghs black dragon): top-tier tower pressure early AND late = push specialist; Dragon Blood innate makes him near-unkillable in lane. Low mobility, kited easily, near-zero anti-BKB.

5.profile_notes: Global Arcane Aura fuels mana-hungry cores (Storm, Zeus, Medusa) — pick-level synergy. Frostbite (point-click root+disarm with DoT ticks, can jungle) stops Blink/mobility heroes; damage profile is mixed: Nova burst + Frostbite DoT + 10s channeled Freezing Field (needs BKB/Glimmer setup). Slowest, squishiest support — prime pickoff target.

50.profile_notes: 7.41 rework: Bad Juju REMOVED (Weave armor shred/boost is now innate); ult = Nothl Projection. During Projection, Poison Touch applies a REAL polymorph hex (pig, 1.4/1.6/1.8s, kills illusions) - so has_hex=1 but ult-gated/conditional, not a standalone Lion/SS hex. Shallow Grave (4-5.5s + heal amp) hard-counters burst but not Axe Cull/Necro Scythe. Shadow Wave gets 30-50% CDR during Projection. No stun, no forced movement; pairs with dive/tempo cores.

51.profile_notes: Cross-map Hookshot pickoff initiation (1.2-1.6s stun, skillshot; pulls Clock TO the enemy - not enemy displacement). Cogs Mana Shock knockback (300 dist) + mana burn pierce BKB = the forced-movement and anti-BKB tools; 7.41: Clock/allies walk over sunken cogs, enemies still trapped (2 hits to break). Battery Assault 0.1s random-target interrupts shred isolated heroes. Global Rocket Flare scouting; Jetpack is Aghs Shard only. Falls off late.

52.profile_notes: Tempo tower-melter: Diabolic Edict (pure damage, pierces BKB, fully affects buildings) shreds towers and BKB carriers; toggle Pulse Nova = constant AoE dps with no big-CD moment. Split Earth flat 1.7s skillshot stun. Needs mana sustain (Bloodstone/Kaya). No escape - punished by silences and gap-closers.

53.profile_notes: Global split-push king: Teleportation everywhere, Sprout trap (does NOT pierce BKB; escapable via TP/quelling) enables team pickoffs and self-escape. Soft pickoff initiation via global TP+Sprout. Wins by map pressure and rat, weak in straight 5v5. Countered by waveclear + teamfight ults.

54.profile_notes: Manfight carry: Rage debuff-immunity windows (3-6s, ~17-20s CD) + Feast sustain make him near-unkillable vs magic-heavy drafts. Infest-bomb combo with SB/Tiny/SK; Infest creep = escape. Open Wounds 50% decaying slow secures kills (does NOT pierce BKB). Countered by kiting, forced movement, Ghost/Eul.

55.profile_notes: Blink Vacuum+Wall of Replica AoE wombo (Wall CD 100s flat, -40s lvl20 talent); elite counter-pick vs clustered teamfight and illusion/agi drafts (Wall clones their carries). Ion Shell lane bully and flash-farm. Surge (ally-targetable, max MS phase) = save/escape/chase. Vacuum relocates enemies and interrupts channels. Weak solo killer.

56.profile_notes: Invis tempo-pickoff carry: Skeleton Walk ganks, deletes supports in ~3s with Strafe + Searing Arrows + Orchid/Deso; Burning Army (70s CD) gives strong split-push and tower damage. Zero native control (Tar Bomb removed) - lockdown comes only from items. Near-useless in grouped 5v5; hard-countered by detection, Ghost Scepter, armor stacking.

57.profile_notes: Hard counter to physical-damage cores: Guardian Angel grants physical immunity 4-5.5s, CD 100/90/80 (lvl3=80s); Aghs makes it global and affects buildings for HG defense. Repel (former Heavenly Grace) = 5s debuff immunity save + regen + 60% magic resist (immunity, not a dispel). Purification pure-damage heal-nuke pierces debuff immunity; Hammer of Purity pure attack modifier with self-heal. Degen Aura innate slow. No stun, no magical damage in kit. Weak vs heavy magic burst.

58.profile_notes: Untouchable AS-slow (pierces debuff immunity, the kit's one BKB-pierce) punishes right-click cores. Enchant vs heroes = basic dispel + 30-60% slow; vs creeps dominates/steals summons up to 120s - counters summon lineups. Impetus pure distance damage (0 CD at lvl4) does NOT pierce BKB. Nature's Attendants wisp heal = her save. Innate Rabble-Rouser: all neutrals/controlled units +4%/lvl damage. Aghs = Little Friends root; Shard = Sproink disjoint leap. Lane-dominance specialist. Weak to gap-close burst.

59.profile_notes: Stat-check snowball hero: Berserker's Blood AS/magic-resist/regen at low HP; Burning Spear stacking magical DoT (per-stack DPS + 0.5% max HP/s) - signature DoT specialist. Life Break dive (32-44% current HP) PIERCES debuff immunity, basic dispel + debuff immunity during leap, 60% slow = reliable soft initiation. Inner Fire = AoE knockback (25-400u forced movement) + 1.5-3s SILENCE (not disarm), does not pierce BKB. Innate Blood Magic: no mana, casts cost HP. Aghs adds 3s taunt to Life Break (item-gated, not counted in base kit). Loves Oracle/Dazzle saves. Countered by pure/%HP damage (AA shard, Silver Edge break, Halberd).

6.profile_notes: Marksmanship disabled by enemies within 400 - hard countered by gap-closers (Slark, PA, Storm). Gust knockback+silence (6s max, interrupts channels, relocates enemies) is her only peel; needs frontline/space team. Multishot makes her a strong deathball/HG sieger and team aura-style physical core. 7.41c buffed Frost Arrows damage and Gust cost.

60.profile_notes: Night-cycle tempo bruiser: Dark Ascension (CD 140/135/130, lvl3=130s) forces 30s night, grants flight+vision+damage for pickoffs. Crippling Fear silence aura: 3s day / 4.5-6s night (max 6s, not 10). Void slow gains a 0.1s ministun at night - interrupt-only (cancels TPs/channels), not a real stun; Shard makes Void AoE. Conditional initiation (night-gated). Weak during day and past 35 min; no lockdown, needs allied stuns to confirm kills.

61.profile_notes: Lane-takeover split-pusher: Spin Web free phased/unobstructed pathing network (escape), Spawn Spiderlings army (now her ultimate), Insatiable Hunger duel lifesteal, Incapacitating Bite slow+miss (only base-kit control). Silken Bola REMOVED in current patch - root exists only via Aghs Spinner's Snare vector traps (2.75s root, 2s arming delay; conditional, item-gated, not counted as base lockdown). Innate Spider's Milk heals from nearby deaths. Warps map - forces dedicated AoE clear (ES, Axe, Underlord) and constant TPs. Micro-heavy; falls off vs late 5v5.

62.profile_notes: Roamer/gold engine: Track bounty snowballs team networth and gives vision-based pickoffs. Track fully pierces debuff immunity (BKB) — verified; Shuriken Toss does NOT pierce, ministun interrupt only. Counters invis-reliant lineups via Track truesight; countered by sentries/gem. Shard saves cores w/ ally invis. Zero push/defense contribution.

63.profile_notes: Slippery carry: Shukuchi invis + Time Lapse make him nearly unkillable without instant lockdown/truesight; counters: Sheepstick, instant silences, dust+root. Swarm shreds armor (anti-tank). Aghs Time Lapse = ally save for pos4 builds (aghs-gated, not in base save_count). Weak vs deathball 5v5.

64.profile_notes: Lane bully (Dual Breath trades) and best budget tower pusher/defender among supports — push specialist: Liquid Fire melts towers, Macropyre+Ice Path zone chokes/highground. Ice Path is a delayed-line skillshot stun (1.1-2.3s). Aghs Macropyre pierces BKB (aghs-gated, not base count). All damage DoT/zoning — weak vs high-mobility heroes.

65.profile_notes: Premier pickoff initiator: blink/Firefly + Flaming Lasso drags target into team. Lasso is unit-target point-click (reliable, NOT skillshot), applies leash and fully pierces BKB — top anti-BKB pick. Forced movement x2: Lasso drag + Flamebreak knockback. Napalm stacks punish melee laners. Needs blink ~12-15min; falls off if behind. Aghs = 2nd lasso target.

66.profile_notes: Micro specialist: converted jungle/ancient creeps give early push tempo, auras and extra disables (creep stuns/roots are unit-based, not counted in hero control fields). Hand of God = global teamfight heal/save (legit save_count=1, but not initiation). Penitence amps physical burst. High skill floor; weak if early push stalls.

67.profile_notes: Global Haunt counters splitpush and punishes pickoffs anywhere on the map; weakest laner among carries, needs space and Radiance timing; Desolate pure dmg (attack-bound, works on spell-immune) + Dispersion shred tanky melee teams; nearly unkillable at 40+ min. No DoT in kit (dot_score corrected to 0).

68.profile_notes: Global Ice Blast (40s CD lvl3) pierces BKB, stops ALL heal/regen and shatter-executes at 12-14% HP — premier counter to Huskar/Morphling/Dazzle/lifesteal cores (anti-BKB specialist); Cold Feet stun 3.0s max but conditional (walk-out range) and needs allied setup; Vortex amps magic teams; very fragile, zero escape, no save for allies despite anti-heal ult.

69.profile_notes: Doom ult pierces BKB: 16s silence + heal-stop DoT removes the enemy win-condition hero (mute items via lvl25 talent, Break via Aghs); damage is MAGICAL that pierces spell immunity, not pure (flag corrected); Infernal Blade 0.66s ministun + max-HP magical burn; Devour gold + neutral creep abilities = rich flexible kit; weak when ult on CD (~115s+ lvl3, hence low fight_cooldown_score); wants Blink+target priority.

7.profile_notes: Blink-dependent: power spikes hard at Blink/Aghs (Totem leap). Echo Slam scales with clumped enemies/illusions - counters Naga/PL/Brood. Fissure (1.6s stun lvl4) terrain block works through BKB for pathing denial, peel and HG defense. Aftershock (1.3s lvl4) makes every cast a stun - control specialist.

70.profile_notes: Earliest Roshan in the game (~6-8 min solo) — drafts around aegis tempo; Overpower+Fury Swipes deletes single targets through BKB (physical attack damage, no spell pierce) in ~3s — single-target burst specialist but easily kited; Enrage dmg reduction + status resist; needs Blink/Shard gap close; weak vs Euls/Ghost/heavy kite.

71.profile_notes: Global Charge (vision on target) punishes solo farmers and isolated supports map-wide — hard pick-off initiator (same class as Chrono/Ravage per rule 4); chain single-target lockdown Charge(2.2s)>Greater Bash(1.5s)>Nether Strike; Greater Bash stun+knockback pierces debuff immunity (Charge stun itself does NOT); knockback = minor enemy displacement (forced_movement kept); Charge blocked by Linken's, cancelled by stuns/hex; no ally save (save_score corrected to 0); falls off hard late.

72.profile_notes: Premier AoE physical DPS vs clumped/melee drafts (Flak Cannon); Flak cannot hit buildings. Homing Missile is destructible delayed stun (1.3-2.5s). Call Down CD reduced to 75/65/55 in 7.41b - frequent teamfight ult, 50% slow zone (60% only from 7.41d). 7.41 innate Afterburner stacks MS on hits - rewards constant fighting. No escape; needs peel vs gap-closers.

73.profile_notes: Fastest farmer in game; hits item timings minutes early and gifts Aghanim's to allies (synergy with aghs-dependent heroes). Chemical Rage = huge sustain/MS. Unstable Concoction stun 1.7/2.2/2.7/3.2s max-brew (nerfed from 4s), brew-timed and unit-targeted -> conditional. Nerfed in 7.41a/c yet still meta. Mid-game power peak.

74.profile_notes: Tornado-EMP-Meteor-Blast wombo; Tornado lift 1.2-3.0s (Quas-scaled) skillshot setup, cycloned units invulnerable. Sun Strike (pure, global) for tempo kills. Cold Snap = repeated interrupts (no hard stun). Deafening Blast knockback is brief, not a relocation tool. 7.41: choose-one Aghs/Shard upgrades, bonus skill points at 6/12/18; pos1 viable. Collapses if mid is lost. 7.41d later nerfed Ghost Walk/Meteor.

75.profile_notes: Global Silence (4.5/5.25/6s, 130s CD - big ult) hard-counters channel/combo-ult drafts (Enigma, Magnus, CM, Bane); doubles as global counter-initiation AND undodgeable soft fight-opener for team engages. Glaives = pure dmg int-steal lane bully. 7.41 innates: +dmg amp/reduction vs silenced, int steal on nearby deaths. Enemy BKBs neutralize him. [save audit 2026-06: Global Silence = counter-initiation / indirect save: shuts down enemy combo that would kill an ally. Not a direct shield/heal, so moderate.]

76.profile_notes: Astral Imprisonment = 4s removal of an enemy OR ally save (not lockdown: target unhittable). Sanity's Eclipse (140/130/120s CD) punishes low-int/low-mana strength drafts; can hit Astral-trapped units. 7.41 Objurgation mana barrier boosts tankiness; strong 7.41c (52%+ WR, pos1 viable). Countered by silences/mana burn.

77.profile_notes: Snowball summon pusher: wolves+Helm army takes towers and 15-min Rosh. Shapeshift = unslowable max-MS rundowns (soft pick initiation, no real disable). No control or saves; falls off late. Countered by AoE waveclear and strong teamfight ults.

78.profile_notes: Blink+Primal Split AoE engage; brewlings bring Cyclone, Boulder stun, ally dispel — top-tier teamfight/HG stall. Evasion+Thunder Clap counter physical cores. 7.41: ult is 2 charges (140/130/120s replenish), softening dead windows but still ult-dependent; 7.41c added 3s initial CD to Cancel Split. Very micro-heavy.

79.profile_notes: Disruption: 2.5s banish = ally save AND pick setup, spawns 2 controllable illusions (value vs/with buffed carries). Demonic Purge strips buffs and slows through BKB; aghs adds break vs PA/Bristle/TB. Shadow Poison stacking makes him a top-tier lane dominator. [save audit 2026-06: Empirical+mechanic audit: Disruption (2.5s invuln banish + dispel + projectile-dodge) is a TOP single-target save — was underrated.]

8.profile_notes: Strong lane (Blade Fury magic immunity + Healing Ward sustain), flexible timings: early Omni pickoffs or BF farm. Spin+TP escape. Zero lockdown - needs team CC for Omnislash value (120s flat CD, -15s lvl15 talent). Omni invuln dodges spells; countered by Ghost/Eul/heavy AoE summons. Healing Ward = team sustain save.

80.profile_notes: Bear-centric: Demolish push + earliest Rosh in game (~10-12min), elite split-push/rat macro. Entangle procs root for ganks; Savage Roar fear peels/disrupts (loss-of-control, NOT forced-movement relocation). Hero body frail without True Form; loses to bear-focus burst. Heavy micro.

81.profile_notes: Phantasm illusion army = physical burst that BKB does not stop (7.41b: 3 illusions all levels, 50/75/100% dmg, 85/80/75s CD); Reality Rift relocates target to him with armor shred (true forced movement), Chaos Bolt random stun 1.25-3.25s across levels. Mana hungry (loves Io/KotL). Countered by AoE waveclear (ES, Lich, Sven) and Medusa.

82.profile_notes: Flash-farm snowball micro carry; global Poof rotations + mass Earthbind (2s root, skillshot net, does NOT pierce BKB; truesight part does) pickoffs. Nerfed in 7.41b: MegaMeepo CD +50% (90s), per-Meepo penalty to item HP/mana bonuses, Earthbind CD talent moved to lvl10. Hard countered by AoE burst/control (ES, Lina, Sven, Winter's Curse). Needs uncontested farm to come online.

83.profile_notes: Living Armor globally sustains lanes/buildings (save, works on towers); tree-walk invis ganks; blink+Overgrowth is hard AoE initiation: 3/4/5s root+disarm (5s at lvl3, no BKB pierce), CD 110/100/90 (Aghs lowers + giant form); top building defender; huge base damage trades early; immobile without trees.

84.profile_notes: Tanky brawl support; Fireblast 1.5s stun (all levels; Aghs Unrefined version 1.2s); Multicast RNG spikes chain-stun (2x=3s, 4x=6s) and multi-Ignite; Bloodlust enables AS cores (TB, Lycan, PA, towers). Str->mana innate, builds tanky. Short cast range, no escape, low late impact.

85.profile_notes: Premier lane bully (Decay str steal stacks); Tombstone zombies win early/mid fights and HG defense (zombie attacks/slow work through BKB); innate Ceaseless Dirge free respawn (480s CD); Flesh Golem (CD 125 base, 90 with Rotting Mitts facet) amps team damage 25-35%; no hard CC, falls off hard at 35+ min. [save audit 2026-06: 7.41 Aghs Shard: Tombstone bunkers an ally (immune to ~8-15 hero attacks; ally survives even if tomb destroyed) + Soul Rip heal (~181 heal/min) — strong SHARD-GATED save.]

86.profile_notes: Power scales with enemy spell quality - draft vs Ravage/Black Hole/RP/Chrono. Blink+Telekinesis (0.95-1.7s lift, throws target, + 0.9-1.5s AoE land stun for others) pickoffs; forced movement = enemy relocation; Fade Bolt gutting of physical cores; Curiosity innate amps stolen durations; weak vs spell-light lineups.

87.profile_notes: Glimpse punishes TPs/mobility heroes, interrupts channels (stop command) and now silences up to 1.8s. Kinetic Field (4.4s barrier, 1s formation delay) + Static Storm (6s AoE silence, CD 100/85/70; aghs mutes items) zone fights, but in 7.41 NONE of his kit pierces debuff immunity - BKB fully walks out of Kinetic Field and ignores both silences. Elite anti-mobility/anti-channel, weak vs BKB timings, helpless if jumped (no escape).

88.profile_notes: Vendetta-Impale-Mind Flare (25-40% of target max mana + 15% of recent damage taken) deletes squishy int supports/mids; innate Mana Burn drains on every hit. Impale stun 1.1-2.0s; Spiked Carapace (0.7-1.6s counter-stun, does NOT pierce BKB) punishes AoE nukers (ES, Lina, Tide). Roaming pickoff tempo hero; falls off hard, countered by sentries/dust and tanky strength cores.

89.profile_notes: Song (7s AoE sleep stasis, CD 160/130/100) sets up wombo with Magnus/Tide/Enigma or resets lost fights - but in 7.41 it does NOT pierce debuff immunity (BKB ignores it). Ensnare roots 2.75-5s with True Sight; Reel In sub-ability channels to drag ensnared targets to her (forced movement). Aghs Ensnare fully affects debuff-immune units + applies Break. Illusions split-push 3 lanes. Needs 25+ min farm; weak to AoE cleave/illusion clear.

9.profile_notes: Sacred Arrow up to 5s stun (min 0.01s point-blank, scales to max at 1500 distance) but pure skillshot - elite pickoff with fog/setup CC. Moonlight Shadow (120/110/100 CD) = global team smoke: initiation AND mass save vs targeted spells. Leap gives team attack/MS buff. Great with setup lockdown (Naga Net, Lion) for arrows. 7.41c buffed Arrow damage.

90.profile_notes: Illuminate (channeled, up to 500 dmg wave) = elite siege defense/wave-clear and lane dominance; in Spirit Form an image channels it and it heals allies. Chakra Magic fuels spell-spam cores (Zeus, Leshrac, Storm) and cuts basic-ability CDs. Blinding Light is a NON-DISABLING 400 knockback: does not interrupt channels and does not affect BKB targets; Solar Bind slow. Recall save is a Spirit Form sub-ability; shard = Solar Bind charges + full Illuminate heal; aghs Will-O-Wisp drags clumps. Zero lockdown, dies to gap-close.

91.profile_notes: Pick only with a tether buddy (Gyro, Tiny, CK, Ursa, Sven): Tether+Overcharge+Relocate turns one core global. Relocate = best save/gank tool pre-15min; Tether is an ALLY link - enemies crossing it only get a brief 40% slow (no stun/root anywhere in kit; base Spirits have no slow, scepter adds 25%/0.3s contact slow). Weak solo lane, draft-dependent, highest micro skill floor.

92.profile_notes: Микро-герой: фамильяры дают пикоффы, пуш и Stone Form стан (0.8/1/1.2s, два фамильяра чейнят до ~2.4s). Summon Familiars CD 120/110/100 после реворка 7.41 — потеря птиц = потеря тайминга (big ult по CD). Иннейт Silent as the Grave даёт полёт/мобильность. Доминирует до 25 мин, проседает в лейте. Gravekeeper's Cloak контрит редкий бурст, но ломается быстрыми атаками/AoE. Familiars — не teamfight-ульта.

93.profile_notes: Снежок через пикоффы по саппортам; слабая лейн-фаза. Pounce — leash 2.5-3.25s (скиллшот, НЕ forced movement: цель не перемещается). Dark Pact снимает почти весь контроль, Shadow Dance игнорирует таргетные способности. Essence Shift — затяжные драки в его пользу. Контры: AoE-станы, Bloodthorn, мгновенный бурст.

94.profile_notes: Гипер-лейт танк через Mana Shield; почти не умирает с уровнями. Stone Gaze — окаменение 2/2.2/2.4s (нужно 2s взгляда на Медузу — conditional), пробивает BKB, лучший counter-engage и HG-дефенс; CD 90s. Очень медленный темп до 30 мин. Контры: mana burn (AM, Nyx, Invoker), сплитпуш, ранний прессинг.

95.profile_notes: Темповый керри с сильной лейн-фазой (ranged harass) и одним из лучших сносов вышек (Fervor). Ensnare-рут 0.8/1.2/1.6/2s, 20% PRD только в melee-форме — conditional, не reliable. Battle Trance — стероид/самодиспел (lvl25 strong dispel), но форсит атаку — опасен под контролем. Контры: kiting, Heaven's Halberd, hex.

96.profile_notes: Классический blink+Hoof Stomp инициатор и фронтлайн-танк. Stomp 1.6/1.8/2/2.2s AoE-стан. Stampede (CD 90) — глобальный сейв/энгейдж/эскейп всей команде (с аганимом + дамаг-редукция); двигает СОЮЗНИКОВ — не forced movement. Retaliate наказывает right-click. Урон чисто от спеллов — слаб в глубоком лейте. Шард даёт таунт-телегу (не в базовом ките — has_taunt=0). [save audit 2026-06: Stampede = team-wide disengage save (unslowable haste to escape), stronger in late game.]

97.profile_notes: Blink-dependent: RP (115s flat CD, 2.5/3/3.5s stun) PIERCES BKB - stun lands through debuff immunity, only damage is blocked; elite anti-BKB initiation. Skewer does NOT move debuff-immune targets and cannot be cast while rooted/leashed; doubles as escape. Scepter Horn Toss = third enemy displacement. Empower turbo-farms melee cores (PA/Sven/CK synergy). Weak if RP baited or blink cancelled.

98.profile_notes: Lane bully vs melee STR offlane matchups (7.41c buffed: +base dmg/int, Reactive Armor regen up). Reactive Armor counters physical/right-click lineups; countered by break (Silver Edge), pure-magic burst and silences. Needs trees: terrible on burned/treeless ground. Chakram pure dmg shreds HG defense but is blocked by BKB. No stuns or initiation - needs team CC.

99.profile_notes: Unkillable frontliner: Bristleback passive punishes melee/physical from behind; Quill Spray pierces BKB; stacking Goo slows are real chase control. 7.41c nerfs: Warpath dmg/stack down, Hairball CD up - slightly weaker mid-game spike. Hard-countered by break (Silver Edge), pure damage, %HP dmg and kiting. No initiation or lockdown - needs team CC.
